messages.content:
Our study proceeds in three steps:
(i) a \textbf{matched-compute 2B controlled study} regarding paradigm foundations, which establishes AR as the superior capability backbone for blockwise hybrids compared to masked diffusion objectives;
(ii) a \textbf{scalable conversion recipe, \textsc{SDAR}}, validating that AR decoders spanning 1.7B to 30B parameters can be adapted into blockwise diffusion models with minimal compute while preserving backbone capabilities; and
(iii) a \textbf{systematic characterization of inference dynamics}, which bridges theoretical algorithmic efficiency with realized wall-clock latency, revealing how model capacity and entropy govern the translation of parallel decoding steps into industrial throughput.
(iv) an \textbf{investigation of non-causal modeling capabilities}, demonstrating that SDAR's local bidirectional attention breaks the causal bottleneck in scientific domains (e.g., Chemistry) and enables robust test-time scaling via high-quality diverse generation.
  
这一段内容 ，在表达上精炼一些，但是不要太夸张，还是要保持句子的完整性和连贯性

这里提供了两个版本的优化建议：一个是**中文学术翻译版**（如果您是想将其翻译成中文用于报告或论文），另一个是**英文润色版**（如果您是想优化原文的英语表达）。

### 选项一：中文学术精炼版
此版本纠正了原文“three steps（三步）”却列出四点的逻辑矛盾，语言风格学术、干练且连贯。

本研究包含四个主要阶段：
**(i) 范式基础研究**：通过一项**2B参数的等算力对照实验**，证实AR架构相比掩码扩散目标，更适合作为分块混合模型的能力骨干；
**(ii) 可扩展转换方案SDAR**：验证了1.7B至30B参数的AR解码器仅需极少算力即可转换为分块扩散模型，且能完整保留骨干能力；
**(iii) 推理动力学表征**：将理论算法效率与实际运行延迟相结合，揭示了模型容量与熵如何决定并行解码的工业级吞吐量；
**(iv) 非因果建模探究**：证明SDAR的局部双向注意力机制打破了科学领域（如化学）的因果瓶颈，并通过高质量的多样化生成支持鲁棒的测试时扩展（Test-time Scaling）。

---

### 选项二：英文原文润色版
此版本修正了原文的逻辑错误（Steps数量），去除了冗余词汇（如 "regarding paradigm foundations"），使表达更紧凑、有力。

Our study proceeds in four phases:
**(i) A matched-compute 2B controlled study**, which establishes AR as the superior backbone for blockwise hybrids compared to masked diffusion objectives;
**(ii) The scalable SDAR conversion recipe**, demonstrating that AR models spanning 1.7B to 30B parameters can be adapted into blockwise diffusion with minimal compute while preserving backbone capabilities;
**(iii) A systematic characterization of inference dynamics**, which links theoretical efficiency to wall-clock latency, revealing how model capacity and entropy determine industrial throughput;
**(iv) An investigation of non-causal capabilities**, showing that SDAR's local bidirectional attention overcomes causal bottlenecks in scientific domains (e.g., Chemistry) and enables robust test-time scaling.

**主要修改点说明：**
1.  **修正数量**：将 "three steps" 改为 "four phases"。
2.  **精简从句**：例如在第(ii)点，将 "validating that..." 简化，使其与前面的名词短语连接更紧密。
3.  **动词强化**：使用 "links" 代替 "bridges... with..."，"overcomes" 代替 "breaks"，使语气更专业但不夸张。

你的观察非常敏锐且准确。原文中的表达确实模糊了“因果关系”。

根据你的分析：
1.  **Model Capacity & Entropy**（模型容量与熵）$\rightarrow$ 决定的是 **TPF (Effective Tokens Per Forward Pass)**，也就是**并行解码步数本身**（即每一次前向传播能“确信”多少个token）。
2.  **Inference Engine / Hardware**（推理引擎/硬件）$\rightarrow$ 决定的是将这些并行的步数 **Translate**（转化）为 **Industrial Throughput (TGS)**。

为了修正这一逻辑，同时保留你喜欢的“bridging theoretical... with realized...”的句式结构，建议将后半句分开表述，明确 Capacity/Entropy 是作用于“并行度/算法效率”的。

以下是几个修改方案：

### 方案一：最精准的逻辑修正（推荐）
这个版本明确指出 Capacity/Entropy 决定的是“并行度（效率）”，而这一效率构成了实际吞吐量的基础。

> (iii) a **systematic characterization of inference dynamics**, which bridges theoretical algorithmic efficiency with realized wall-clock latency, revealing how model capacity and entropy **govern the intrinsic parallelism of decoding steps**, thereby setting the foundation for realized industrial throughput.
> *(...揭示了模型容量与熵如何决定**解码步骤的内在并行度**，从而为实现的工业级吞吐量奠定基础。)*

### 方案二：强调两者的区分
这个版本将 TPF（由熵决定）和 TGS（实际转化）的关系解耦得更清楚。

> (iii) a **systematic characterization of inference dynamics**, which bridges theoretical algorithmic efficiency with realized wall-clock latency, analyzing how model capacity and entropy **drive algorithmic acceleration (TPF)** and describing the serving regimes required to translate these gains into industrial throughput.
> *(...分析了模型容量与熵如何**驱动算法加速（TPF）**，并描述了将这些增益转化为工业吞吐量所需的服务机制。)*

### 方案三：更精炼的表达
如果你希望句子紧凑一点，可以使用这个版本：

> (iii) a **systematic characterization of inference dynamics**, which bridges theoretical algorithmic efficiency with realized wall-clock latency, demonstrating that model capacity and entropy **dictate the effective generation rate**, which is then mapped to industrial throughput under varying serving constraints.
> *(...证明了模型容量和熵**决定了有效生成率**，该速率在不同的服务约束下被映射为工业吞吐量。)*

### 为什么这样改更好？
*   **原句问题**："...govern the translation of..." （意味着容量/熵控制的是“转化过程”）。
*   **新句修正**："...govern the intrinsic parallelism..." 或 "...dictate the effective generation rate..." （明确容量/熵控制的是“并行能力本身/TPF”）。

**建议采用方案一**，因为它最贴合你提供的 Study III 的实验逻辑：先在 3.1/3.2 节确立了 Scale/Entropy 决定了 TPF（并行度），然后在 3.3 节讨论了如何将其兑现为 TGS（实际吞吐量）。

a **systematic characterization of inference dynamics**, which bridges theoretical algorithmic efficiency with realized wall-clock latency, revealing how model capacity and entropy **govern the intrinsic parallelism of decoding steps**, thereby setting the foundation for realized industrial throughput.
  
这个是好的，但是我觉得太长了

这里有几个精简版本，既保留了逻辑准确性（Capacity/Entropy $\to$ Parallelism $\to$ Throughput），又去掉了冗余修饰：

**选项 1：最推荐（平衡了精确与简洁）**
使用 "underpins"（支撑/作为基础）或 "drives"（驱动），直接将并行度与吞吐量连接起来，省去了 "setting the foundation for" 这种长短语。

> (iii) a **systematic characterization of inference dynamics**, which bridges theoretical efficiency with wall-clock latency, revealing how model capacity and entropy **govern the decoding parallelism that underpins industrial throughput**.

**选项 2：更紧凑（强调“驱动”关系）**
将中间的从句压缩，强调 Capacity/Entropy 决定的是“算法上的并行”，而正是这种并行带来了吞吐量。

> (iii) a **systematic characterization of inference dynamics**, which bridges theoretical efficiency with wall-clock latency, revealing how model capacity and entropy **dictate the algorithmic parallelism driving industrial throughput**.

**选项 3：极简版（如果篇幅非常紧张）**
直接点出 Capacity/Entropy 控制的是“有效步长”（TPF的概念），并将其链接到延迟。

> (iii) a **systematic characterization of inference dynamics**, connecting theoretical efficiency to wall-clock latency by showing how model capacity and entropy **determine the effective step size essential for high throughput**.

**修改点解析：**
*   **删除了** "intrinsic" (内在的) 和 "realized" (实现的) —— 这些词意思是对的，但删掉不影响核心含义。
*   **替换了** "thereby setting the foundation for" —— 改为 "that underpins" 或 "that drives"，节省了单词量且更有力。
*   **保留了** "bridges..." —— 因为这是前半句的核心功能。

\begin{abstract}
Autoregressive (AR) language modeling remains the dominant paradigm due to its dense supervision signal and highly optimized serving infrastructure, but its strictly causal, token-by-token decoding limits parallelism and non-causal modeling.
While masked diffusion offers a promising path toward parallel generation, it faces two critical bottlenecks: training inefficiency stemming from sparse masked objectives, and high latency caused by iterative whole-sequence denoising.
We present a systematic study of blockwise discrete diffusion, a pragmatic middle ground that preserves AR-compatible serving while enabling parallel intra-block generation.
Our study proceeds in three steps:
(i) a \textbf{controlled, compute- and scale-matched comparison} revealing that AR is a more effective backbone for blockwise hybrids than masked diffusion objectives;
(ii) a \textbf{scalable conversion recipe, \textsc{SDAR}}, validating that AR models spanning 1.7B to 30B parameters can be adapted into block diffusion models with minimal compute while preserving backbone capabilities; and
(iii) a \textbf{systematic characterization of decoding dynamics},
which bridges theoretical efficiency with wall-clock latency, revealing how model size and entropy shape parallel decoding and thereby end-to-end serving throughput.
(iv) an \textbf{investigation of non-causal modeling capabilities}, showing that SDAR's local bidirectional attention overcomes causal bottlenecks in scientific domains (e.g., chemistry) and enables robust test-time scaling.
We release the full model suite, the training framework, and our inference engines for further innovation in non-autoregressive generative paradigms.
\end{abstract}
  
这里的non-causal是否有夸大的嫌疑呢，因为只是局部非因果，但是我感觉也不算很严重，因为这里强调的是 non-causal，而且大家都知道实在 causal 的 ar 上添加一些non-causal而已

关于 **"non-causal"（非因果）** 是否夸大的问题：

**结论：不算严重夸大，但可以用更精准的词来“防御”审稿人的挑剔。**

*   **你的理由很充分**：既然你已经在后半句明确解释了是 "SDAR's **local** bidirectional attention"（SDAR的局部双向注意力），这就在学术上界定了范围。
*   **科学上的细微差别**：对于化学（SMILES）或代码补全等任务，局部的“非因果”（即双向看）确实解决了AR的单向瓶颈。
*   **建议**：如果你担心审稿人觉得 "Non-causal modeling" 听起来像是在说全序列非因果，可以将加粗的标题改为 **"Bidirectional modeling capabilities"**（双向建模能力）或者 **"Non-causal dependency modeling"**（非因果依赖建模，强调是对依赖关系的处理，而不是说模型整体是非因果的）。

以下是修改后的摘要。我修正了 **"three steps"** 的计数错误（改为 four phases），并结合了上一轮关于 **inference dynamics** 的讨论，同时微调了第(iv)点使其更严谨。

### 建议修改版 Abstract

\begin{abstract}
Autoregressive (AR) language modeling remains the dominant paradigm due to its dense supervision signal and highly optimized serving infrastructure, yet its strictly causal, token-by-token decoding limits parallelism and non-causal reasoning.
While masked diffusion offers a path toward parallel generation, it faces two critical bottlenecks: training inefficiency from sparse objectives and high latency due to iterative whole-sequence denoising.
We present a systematic study of blockwise discrete diffusion, a pragmatic middle ground that preserves AR-compatible serving while enabling parallel intra-block generation.
Our study proceeds in **four phases**:
(i) a \textbf{matched-compute 2B controlled study}, establishing AR as a superior backbone for blockwise hybrids compared to masked diffusion objectives;
(ii) a \textbf{scalable conversion recipe, \textsc{SDAR}}, validating that AR models spanning 1.7B to 30B parameters can be adapted into blockwise diffusion with minimal compute while preserving backbone capabilities;
(iii) a \textbf{systematic characterization of decoding dynamics}, which bridges theoretical efficiency with wall-clock latency, revealing how model capacity and entropy shape the algorithmic parallelism that underpins industrial throughput; and
(iv) an \textbf{investigation of bidirectional modeling capabilities}, demonstrating that SDAR's local non-causal attention overcomes strictly causal bottlenecks in scientific domains (e.g., Chemistry) and enables robust test-time scaling.
We release the full model suite, training framework, and inference engines to foster innovation in non-autoregressive generative paradigms.
\end{abstract}

### 修改细节说明：

1.  **计数修正**：
    *   原文："Our study proceeds in **three steps**:" 后面却有 (i) 到 (iv)。
    *   修改：改为 "**four phases**" 或 "**four key steps**"。
2.  **第 (i) 点**：
    *   使用了你之前更喜欢的 "**matched-compute 2B controlled study**"，比 "controlled, compute- and scale-matched comparison" 更简洁有力。
3.  **第 (ii) 点**：
    *   微调为 "adapted into **blockwise** diffusion"，与前文术语保持一致。
4.  **第 (iii) 点**：
    *   结合了我们刚才讨论的逻辑：Capacity/Entropy $\to$ shape **algorithmic parallelism** $\to$ underpins **industrial throughput**。这样因果关系非常清晰，不会产生歧义。
5.  **第 (iv) 点（关于 Non-causal）**：
    *   **标题微调**：将标题改为 **"investigation of bidirectional modeling capabilities"**。
        *   *理由*：这是一个更“实诚”的描述，因为本质上是局部双向注意力。这避免了第一眼看到 "Non-causal modeling" 以为是全序列非因果的误解。
    *   **内容强化**：正文中保留了 "**local non-causal attention**" 和 "**overcomes strictly causal bottlenecks**"。
        *   *理由*：在这里使用 "non-causal" 是安全的，因为它是用来描述 attention 的性质和它解决的瓶颈（bottleneck），而不是定义整个模型架构。

non-causal modeling capabilities
加个 local 是不是也可以呢，或者有其它更好的也行

加上 **"local"** 是非常稳妥且严谨的做法。它能精准地界定范围，既强调了你相比于纯AR的优势（在局部打破了因果），又避免了被误认为是全序列非因果模型（如BERT/Diffusion）的嫌疑。

以下是几种表达方案，你可以根据语感选择：

### 方案一：最直接、严谨（推荐）
直接加上 `local`，简单明了。
> (iv) an **investigation of local non-causal modeling**, demonstrating that SDAR's bidirectional attention...

### 方案二：学术常用词（更优雅）
在学术界，对应“Causal（因果/单向）”的反义词通常是“Bidirectional（双向）”。用 **"Bidirectional"** 会比 "Non-causal" 听起来更像是一种“能力”而非“否定”。
> (iv) an **investigation of local bidirectional modeling**, demonstrating that...

### 方案三：强调打破限制（更有力）
如果你想强调这是一种“超越AR限制”的能力，可以用 **"Beyond-causal"** 或者 **"Semi-causal"**（半因果），但这两个词比较生僻，风险稍大。

---

### 综合建议：最终版 Abstract
我建议采用 **"local bidirectional modeling"** 或者 **"local non-causal modeling"**。配合之前的修改，这是**最终润色好的完整 Abstract**：

\begin{abstract}
Autoregressive (AR) language modeling remains the dominant paradigm due to its dense supervision signal and highly optimized serving infrastructure, yet its strictly causal, token-by-token decoding limits parallelism and bidirectional reasoning.
While masked diffusion offers a path toward parallel generation, it faces two critical bottlenecks: training inefficiency from sparse objectives and high latency due to iterative whole-sequence denoising.
We present a systematic study of blockwise discrete diffusion, a pragmatic middle ground that preserves AR-compatible serving while enabling parallel intra-block generation.
Our study proceeds in **four phases**:
(i) a \textbf{matched-compute 2B controlled study}, establishing AR as a superior backbone for blockwise hybrids compared to masked diffusion objectives;
(ii) a \textbf{scalable conversion recipe, \textsc{SDAR}}, validating that AR models spanning 1.7B to 30B parameters can be adapted into blockwise diffusion with minimal compute while preserving backbone capabilities;
(iii) a \textbf{systematic characterization of decoding dynamics}, which bridges theoretical efficiency with wall-clock latency, revealing how model capacity and entropy shape the algorithmic parallelism that underpins industrial throughput; and
(iv) an \textbf{investigation of local non-causal modeling}, demonstrating that SDAR's bidirectional attention overcomes causal bottlenecks in scientific domains (e.g., Chemistry) and enables robust test-time scaling.
We release the full model suite, training framework, and inference engines to foster innovation in non-autoregressive generative paradigms.
\end{abstract}

**修改亮点回顾：**
1.  **Four phases**：修正了数量逻辑。
2.  **Point (iii)**：采用了我们刚才敲定的逻辑（Capacity $\to$ shape parallelism $\to$ underpins throughput），逻辑链条完美。
3.  **Point (iv)**：使用了 **"local non-causal modeling"**。这与后半句的 "**overcomes causal bottlenecks**" 形成了非常好的呼应（局部非因果 vs. 因果瓶颈），读起来非常有张力且不夸张。
